holdings.infoBox: CDL is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are WEC Energy Group stock at 1.67%, Alliant Energy at 1.65%, Duke Energy at 1.64%, Evergy at 1.62%, and FirstEnergy at 1.61%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares US Large Cap High Dividend Volatility Wtd ETF (CDL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of dividend-paying large-cap stocks, weighted by inverse volatility. CDL was launched on Jul 8, 2015 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Nasdaq Victory U.S. Large Cap High Dividend 100 Volatility Weighted Index
